name: Betty Queen Center
description: Come play pickleball at Betty Queen Center in Louisa, VA! There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints
description: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisa, VA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is private. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Jouett Elementary School tennis courts
description: Jouett Elementary School tennis courts is a place to play pickleball in Mineral, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: LCHS Tennis Courts
description: LCHS Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisa, VA. There are 6 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net.

name: Spring Creek Sports Club
description: Spring Creek Sports Club is a place to play pickleball in Zion Crossroads, VA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Thomas Jefferson Elementary School
description: Thomas Jefferson Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Louisa, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Trevilians Elementary School Tennis Courts in Louisa, VA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Zion United Methodist Church
description: Zion United Methodist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Troy, VA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
